briefs.title: Specific Supportive Housing Properties Get a Special Tax Class for 2026
briefs.summary: BC updated its property classification rules to designate certain eligible supportive housing properties under a special category for the 2026 tax year, which affects how those properties are assessed (valued for tax purposes).
briefs.action_required: Check if your property is listed on the 2026 assessment roll as designated supportive housing to confirm your tax class.

key_dates.label: BC supportive housing property tax designation takes effect — 2026 taxation year
